2144870.name: Tribute
2144870.description:
TRIBUTE is a 3v3 battle arena with the core gameplay built around on-field heroes switching, strategic points capturing, and lane-pushing control

Features:

  • Switch heroes: Choose three heroes for the match and seamlessly swap between them on the battlefield. Unleash the full potential of each hero, triggering powerful batteries as you switch.
  • Capture strategic points: Capture control points and deploy versatile structures. Secure the area with Outposts or push the enemy base with Drone Stations. Dominate the battlefield through control point management.
  • Team up: Join forces with your team to create unique tactics, utilizing hero synergies for maximum impact. Outsmart enemies with strategic teamwork and launch powerful combos on the battlefield.
2144870.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
